identity.name: The Sealed Codex Vault
identity.architectural_style: cut stone with carved arcane reliefs
identity.atmosphere: cold lamplight, dust-shrouded shelves, faint glyph-glow from the forbidden hall
identity.narrative_role: objective dungeon culminating in the forbidden hall

rooms.name: Sunken Entrance Garden
notes: open-air sunken courtyard above the library entrance
two stone planters and two ancient trees give partial and full cover
central stair descends to reception

rooms.name: Scriptorium Reception
notes: stone counter spans the chamber center as half cover
two index cabinets along east and west walls
iron-bound double door on south wall to the main hall

rooms.name: Hall of Open Tomes
notes: two parallel bookshelf rows act as full cover with deliberate gaps
two reading tables provide half cover and ranged lanes
wide ornate archway on south wall opens to the forbidden hall

rooms.name: Forbidden Hall of Chained Tomes
notes: huge sealed door on the south wall is the objective; cannot be opened until the construct is destroyed
four stone pillars break sightlines and provide hard cover
chained tome lecterns at the corners radiate occasional unstable magic
the 4 by 4 construct begins standing directly before the sealed door

corridors.door_type: open stone archway with descending stair
ornate wide archway on shared wall, no door

notes: optional: 2 awakened stone gargoyles perched on the planters (CR 2 each)
trees and planters give the party real cover choices on approach
3 flying swords or animated tomes (CR 1/4 each) plus 1 specter librarian (CR 1) drift between the shelves
bookshelves break line of sight; reading tables anchor the center lanes
tuned as a medium encounter to drain resources before the boss
the Bookbound Sentinel: helmed-horror frame welded to a 4x4 stone slab, CR 5 to CR 6 single boss for level 5 party of 4
starts adjacent to the sealed south door it guards
lair-style reactions: chained lecterns can be activated as an action to slow the construct or hurl arcane bolts
pillars allow line-of-sight breaks against the construct's ranged attacks
